---
title: "Evaluating the forehead temperature for estimating the postmortem interval"
author: "Lennart Bedarf"
date: "2026-02-18"
categories: [Paper]
---

![](thumbnail.jpg)

**Bedarf, L.**, Gerlach K., Wittig H., Scheurer E., Berger C., Lenz C. (2026).
*Evaluating the forehead temperature for estimating the postmortem interval*.
**Int J Legal Med**, *140*, 1863-1869.
[DOI: 10.1007/s00414-026-03736-x](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00414-026-03736-x){targes="_blank"}
